brief_notes: Sophisticated, well-structured paper. All key values verified: 366 maps, 1.8-7.1 A, 0.197 delta-CCC (p=0.0006), 0.150 (p=0.003), 10-11 iterations, 0.87 A^2 deviation, CCC 0.82->0.94, chain LoQFit values (5.4, 5.6, 7.4, 7.0, 7.3 -> 6.0, 5.7, 5.9), MolProbity 2.8, clash 14, 1.1%, 2.1%. Named citations (trabuco2008, jumper2021, etc.), excellent related-work section, strong technical mixture-model derivation.
